description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire. He wears a puffy vest over a plaid shirt with rolled-up sleeves, paired with straight-cut jeans and sturdy lace-up shoes. The figure's facial features are well-defined, with a neutral expression and neatly styled short hair. His arms are slightly bent and held away from his body, and his hands are relaxed. The clothing is detailed with visible seams and folds, and the shoes have a rugged, outdoor look. The overall build is average, and the proportions are realistic for an adult male pedestrian.
description: A casually dressed adult male figure in a puffy vest, plaid shirt, jeans, and sturdy shoes, with short styled hair and a neutral stance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the puffy vest, plaid shirt, facial features, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vest, shirt, and jeans, with hair and shoe details visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual puffy vest over a plaid shirt with rolled-up sleeves and straight-cut jeans
